results.title: She Played a Sci-Fi Heroine in the '80s – Now at 70, She Looks Like This and Has a Completely Different Career – Details Photos
results.description: Long after the cameras stopped rolling, the former actress made a choice that would completely reshape how she was seen — not by fans, but by the people who came to rely on her in their most difficult moments. She once crossed galaxies, faced a ruthless interplanetary ruler, and became...

results.title: Heartwood Presents Sci-Fi Horror in ‘The Machine Stops’
results.description: “The Machine Stops,” an original production by writer/director Griff Braley, looks to the past to ponder our collective future. Heartwood Regional Theater Co. presents the piece, which debuts Friday, July 17 in the Parker B. Poe Theater, at 81 Academy Road in Newcastle.
